strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Founder of GISCollective since 2016: shipped a real open-source geo-data platform with actual NGO users, demonstrating sustained entrepreneurial execution inside a day-job career
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), showing genuine builder engagement with the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and only ~14 months old (April 2025–present); no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale exist prior to current role — the preferred 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products' is not met

No director-level or strategic advisory track record: career arc is senior/staff IC with no evidence of advising executive customers, shaping product strategy across orgs, or operating as an internal thought leader beyond local workshops
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field and no cloud-platform depth beyond AWS CDK and Kubernetes configuration — both strongly preferred for a Principal AI Strategy hire
response.justification: The role's two non-negotiable axes are deep, recognized AI expertise (demonstrated products, platform thinking) and director-level strategic advisory capability. On AI depth, Bogdan's only traceable work is 14 months of MCP tooling at a staff-IC level — no shipped AI products, no public AI research, no history of advising customers on AI adoption. On leadership, the résumé shows strong craft and local mentorship (dojos, workshops) but nothing approaching customer-facing strategy or cross-organizational influence at executive altitude. The entrepreneurial thread (GISCollective, WatchUp iOS rescue) is genuine but small-scale and product-execution-oriented, not strategy-oriented. Experience breadth and years clear the bar, but those are table-stakes for a role where the differentiating requirements are unmet.
